LongParameterList:AblCompletionContributor.kt$AblCompletionProvider$( objectName: String, prefix: String, service: com.ablls.plugin.core.AblProjectAnalysisService, uri: String, scope: org.prorefactor.treeparser.TreeParserSymbolScope?, result: CompletionResultSet )

LongParameterList:AblCompletionContributor.kt$AblCompletionProvider$( procName: String, prefix: String, service: com.ablls.plugin.core.AblProjectAnalysisService, uri: String, scope: org.prorefactor.treeparser.TreeParserSymbolScope?, result: CompletionResultSet )
LongParameterList:AblRenameHandler.kt$AblRenameHandler$( project: Project, file: PsiFile, oldName: String, newName: String, rootScope: TreeParserSymbolScope, targetDef: JPNode )
LongParameterList:AblRunConfigurationType.kt$AblRunState.Companion$( executable: String, programFile: String, batchMode: Boolean, forDebug: Boolean, debugPort: Int, programParam: String = "" )
MaxLineLength:AblAnnotator.kt$AblAnnotator$"${errors.size} erreurs syntaxiques (${errors.size - 20} masquées) — vérifiez le PROPATH dans openedge-project.json"
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("DATETIME-TZ", "**DATETIME-TZ** `(date, ms, tz)` → `DATETIME-TZ`\n\nConstruit une datetime avec fuseau horaire.")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("DEFINED", "**DEFINED** `(name)` → `INTEGER`\n\n`0` si non défini, `1` si global, `2` si scoped, `3` si paramètre.")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("ERROR", "**ERROR** → `LOGICAL`\n\nAttribut de `ERROR-STATUS`. `TRUE` si la dernière instruction a levé une erreur.")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("FIRST-OF", "**FIRST-OF** `(field)` → `LOGICAL`\n\n`TRUE` pour le premier enregistrement d'un groupe (`BREAK BY`).")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("GETBYTE", "**GETBYTE** `(string, position)` → `INTEGER`\n\nRetourne la valeur d'octet à la position donnée.")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("LEFT-TRIM", "**LEFT-TRIM** `(string [, chars])` → `CHARACTER`\n\nSupprime les espaces en **début** de chaîne.")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("LOCKED", "**LOCKED** `(record)` → `LOGICAL`\n\n`TRUE` si l'enregistrement est verrouillé par un autre utilisateur.")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("MTIME", "**MTIME** `[(date)]` → `INTEGER`\n\nHeure en millisecondes depuis minuit. Sans argument : heure courante.")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("NO-ERROR", "**NO-ERROR** — Supprime l'exception sur l'instruction courante. Tester `ERROR-STATUS:ERROR` ensuite.")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("NO-UNDO", "**NO-UNDO** — La variable/temp-table n'est pas restaurée lors d'un UNDO (meilleure performance).")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("NO-WAIT", "**NO-WAIT** — Retourne immédiatement si l'enregistrement est verrouillé (plutôt que d'attendre).")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("READ-XML", "**READ-XML** `(schema-type, source [, read-mode [, schema-source [, lang]]])`\n\nLit du XML dans un DATASET ou TEMP-TABLE.")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("RIGHT-TRIM", "**RIGHT-TRIM** `(string [, chars])` → `CHARACTER`\n\nSupprime les espaces en **fin** de chaîne.")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("SEARCH", "**SEARCH** `(filename)` → `CHARACTER`\n\nRecherche un fichier dans le PROPATH. Retourne `?` si non trouvé.")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("UNDO", "**UNDO** `[label] [LEAVE|NEXT|RETURN|RETRY|THROW]`\n\nAnnule les modifications et transfère le contrôle.")
MaxLineLength:AblBuiltinDocs.kt$AblBuiltinDocs$put("WRITE-XML", "**WRITE-XML** `(schema-type, target [, pretty-print ...])`\n\nSérialise un DATASET ou TEMP-TABLE en XML.")
MaxLineLength:AblCognitiveComplexityInspection.kt$AblCognitiveComplexityInspection$"$label has cognitive complexity $complexity (threshold: $THRESHOLD) — consider splitting into smaller routines"

MaxLineLength:AblCompileGutterIconProvider.kt$CompileAblFileAction$"DLC path is not configured.

Set 'dlcPath' in openedge-project.json
or define the DLC environment variable."

MaxLineLength:AblCyclomaticComplexityInspection.kt$AblCyclomaticComplexityInspection.<no name provided>$"$kind has cyclomatic complexity $cc (threshold: $MAX_CC) — consider breaking it into smaller units"
MaxLineLength:AblDocumentationProviderTest.kt$AblDocumentationProviderTest$assertTrue("Fallback doc must mention variable name or type", doc!!.contains("myVar") || doc.contains("INTEGER"))

MaxLineLength:AblFindFirstNoErrorInspection.kt$AblFindFirstNoErrorInspection.<no name provided>$"FIND FIRST/LAST without NO-ERROR throws a fatal error when no record is found — add NO-ERROR and check AVAILABLE"

MaxLineLength:AblFindFirstNoErrorInspectionTest.kt$AblFindFirstNoErrorInspectionTest$"""<warning descr="FIND FIRST/LAST without NO-ERROR throws a fatal error when no record is found — add NO-ERROR and check AVAILABLE">FIND</warning> FIRST Customer WHERE Customer.CustNum = 1 NO-LOCK."""

MaxLineLength:AblFindFirstNoErrorInspectionTest.kt$AblFindFirstNoErrorInspectionTest$"""<warning descr="FIND FIRST/LAST without NO-ERROR throws a fatal error when no record is found — add NO-ERROR and check AVAILABLE">FIND</warning> LAST Customer WHERE Customer.CustNum = 1 NO-LOCK."""
MaxLineLength:AblFindNoLockInspection.kt$AblFindNoLockInspection.<no name provided>$val hasLock = findNode.query(ABLNodeType.NOLOCK, ABLNodeType.SHARELOCK, ABLNodeType.EXCLUSIVELOCK).isNotEmpty()

MaxLineLength:AblFindNoLockInspectionTest.kt$AblFindNoLockInspectionTest$"""<warning descr="Missing lock modifier on FIND (defaults to SHARE-LOCK, which is often dangerous).">FIND</warning> Customer WHERE Customer.CustNum = 1."""

MaxLineLength:AblFortranOperatorsInspectionTest.kt$AblFortranOperatorsInspectionTest$"""IF x <warning descr="Deprecated Fortran-style operator 'eq' — use '=' instead">EQ</warning> 5 THEN MESSAGE "yes"."""

MaxLineLength:AblMissingSchemaPrefixInspection.kt$AblMissingSchemaPrefixInspection.<no name provided>$"Table '$name' referenced without database prefix in multi-db environment$dbHint — use 'dbname.$name'"

MaxLineLength:AblNewProjectWizard.kt$AblNewProjectWizardStep$"/* main.p — Point d'entrée du projet ${context.projectName} */

MESSAGE "Hello from ${context.projectName}!" VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.
"

MaxLineLength:AblNoErrorWithoutCheckInspection.kt$AblNoErrorWithoutCheckInspection.<no name provided>$"NO-ERROR used without subsequent ERROR-STATUS:ERROR, AVAILABLE or RETURN-VALUE check — errors will be silently ignored"

MaxLineLength:AblNoErrorWithoutCheckInspection.kt$AblNoErrorWithoutCheckInspection.<no name provided>$val range = AblInspectionHelper.toRange(doc, noErrorNode.line, noErrorNode.column, "NO-ERROR".length)
MaxLineLength:AblNoUndoInspectionTest.kt$AblNoUndoInspectionTest$"""<warning descr="Missing NO-UNDO modifier on VARIABLE (affects performance)">DEFINE</warning> VARIABLE iCount AS INTEGER."""
MaxLineLength:AblParserFacade.kt$AblParserFacade$// Éviter de spammer les erreurs sur la même ligne si ANTLR a déjà signalé une erreur (ex: lors d'une tentative de récupération)
MaxLineLength:AblPostfixTemplateProvider.kt$AblPostfixTemplateProvider$AblPostfixTemplate("alert", "MESSAGE expr VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX.", "MESSAGE \$EXPR\$ VIEW-AS ALERT-BOX INFORMATION.\$END\$", this)
MaxLineLength:AblPostfixTemplateProvider.kt$AblPostfixTemplateProvider$AblPostfixTemplate("if", "IF expr THEN DO: ... END.", "IF \$EXPR\$ THEN DO:\n \$END\$\nEND.", this)
MaxLineLength:AblPostfixTemplateProvider.kt$AblPostfixTemplateProvider$AblPostfixTemplate("ifnot", "IF NOT expr THEN DO: ... END.", "IF NOT \$EXPR\$ THEN DO:\n \$END\$\nEND.", this)
MaxLineLength:AblProcedureLengthInspection.kt$AblProcedureLengthInspection.<no name provided>$"$kind is $length lines long (threshold: $MAX_LINES) — consider splitting into smaller units"
MaxLineLength:AblPropathExplorerPanel.kt$AblPropathExplorerPanel.PropathTreeCellRenderer$NodeKind.DIR_MISSING -> { icon = AllIcons.Nodes.Folder; foreground = java.awt.Color.RED; text = info.label }
MaxLineLength:AblRenameHandlerTest.kt$AblRenameHandlerTest$assertFalse("Original name must not remain after textual fallback rename", result.contains("myVar", ignoreCase = true))
MaxLineLength:AblRunStateTest.kt$AblRunStateTest$val args = AblRunState.buildArgList(exe, prog, batchMode = false, forDebug = false, debugPort = 0, programParam = "")
MaxLineLength:AblRunStateTest.kt$AblRunStateTest$val args = AblRunState.buildArgList(exe, prog, batchMode = false, forDebug = false, debugPort = 0, programParam = "foo")
MaxLineLength:AblSchemaValidationInspection.kt$AblSchemaValidationInspection.<no name provided>$"Field '$fieldName' not found in table '$tableName' (schema: ${knownTables.size} tables loaded)"

MaxLineLength:AblStringConcatInWhereInspection.kt$AblStringConcatInWhereInspection.<no name provided>$"String concatenation (+) in WHERE clause disables index usage — evaluate expression before the query"

MaxLineLength:AblUnusedVariableInspectionTest.kt$AblUnusedVariableInspectionTest$"""DEFINE VARIABLE <warning descr="Variable 'iCount' is defined but never read">iCount</warning> AS INTEGER NO-UNDO."""

UnusedPrivateProperty:AblExtractProcedureIntention.kt$AblExtractProcedureIntention$val procNameOffset = endOfFile + "

PROCEDURE ".length + callText.length - callText.length + doc.textLength - procDefinition.length + "

PROCEDURE ".length

UnusedPrivateProperty:AblFindNoLockInspection.kt$AblFindNoLockInspection.Companion$// Source de vérité : ABLNodeType — couvre les abréviations automatiquement private val LOCK_TYPES: Set<ABLNodeType> = java.util.EnumSet.of( ABLNodeType.NOLOCK, ABLNodeType.SHARELOCK, ABLNodeType.EXCLUSIVELOCK )

UnusedPrivateProperty:AblSafeDeleteHandler.kt$AblSafeDeleteAction$val usages = service.symbolIndex.allSymbols() .filter { sym -> sym.kind == AblSymbol.Kind.UNKNOWN && sym.name.equals(symbolName, ignoreCase = true) }

VariableNaming:AblColorSettingsPage.kt$AblColorSettingsPage$// Tags personnalisés pour le texte d'exemple (optionnel) // Permet de colorier les éléments de l'exemple de façon indépendante private val ADDITIONAL_TAGS = mapOf( "kw" to AblSyntaxHighlighter.KEYWORD, "kdef" to AblSyntaxHighlighter.KEYWORD_DEF, "kflow" to AblSyntaxHighlighter.KEYWORD_FLOW, "ktype" to AblSyntaxHighlighter.KEYWORD_TYPE, "kmod" to AblSyntaxHighlighter.KEYWORD_MOD, "kdb" to AblSyntaxHighlighter.KEYWORD_DB, "str" to AblSyntaxHighlighter.STRING, "num" to AblSyntaxHighlighter.NUMBER, "log" to AblSyntaxHighlighter.LOGICAL_LITERAL, "cmt" to AblSyntaxHighlighter.BLOCK_COMMENT, "pp" to AblSyntaxHighlighter.PREPROCESSOR, "ann" to AblSyntaxHighlighter.ANNOTATION, )

VariableNaming:AblColorSettingsPage.kt$AblColorSettingsPage$private val DESCRIPTORS = arrayOf( AttributesDescriptor("Keyword", AblSyntaxHighlighter.KEYWORD), AttributesDescriptor("Keyword//Flow control (IF, DO, FOR, END...)", AblSyntaxHighlighter.KEYWORD_FLOW), AttributesDescriptor("Keyword//Definition (DEFINE, CLASS, METHOD...)", AblSyntaxHighlighter.KEYWORD_DEF), AttributesDescriptor("Keyword//Database (FIND, FOR EACH, WHERE...)", AblSyntaxHighlighter.KEYWORD_DB), AttributesDescriptor("Keyword//Access modifier (PUBLIC, PRIVATE, STATIC...)", AblSyntaxHighlighter.KEYWORD_MOD), AttributesDescriptor("Keyword//Primitive type (CHARACTER, INTEGER...)", AblSyntaxHighlighter.KEYWORD_TYPE), AttributesDescriptor("String", AblSyntaxHighlighter.STRING), AttributesDescriptor("Number", AblSyntaxHighlighter.NUMBER), AttributesDescriptor("Logical literal (TRUE/FALSE/YES/NO/?)", AblSyntaxHighlighter.LOGICAL_LITERAL), AttributesDescriptor("Comment//Block comment", AblSyntaxHighlighter.BLOCK_COMMENT), AttributesDescriptor("Comment//Line comment", AblSyntaxHighlighter.LINE_COMMENT), AttributesDescriptor("Preprocessor (&DEFINE, {include})", AblSyntaxHighlighter.PREPROCESSOR), AttributesDescriptor("Operator", AblSyntaxHighlighter.OPERATOR), AttributesDescriptor("Punctuation//Dot (.)", AblSyntaxHighlighter.DOT), AttributesDescriptor("Punctuation//Colon (:)", AblSyntaxHighlighter.COLON), AttributesDescriptor("Punctuation//Comma (,)", AblSyntaxHighlighter.COMMA), AttributesDescriptor("Punctuation//Parentheses", AblSyntaxHighlighter.PARENTHESES), AttributesDescriptor("Identifier", AblSyntaxHighlighter.IDENTIFIER), AttributesDescriptor("Annotation (@...)", AblSyntaxHighlighter.ANNOTATION), AttributesDescriptor("Bad character", AblSyntaxHighlighter.BAD_CHARACTER), )

VariableNaming:AblFoldingBuilder.kt$AblBracketMatcher$private val PAIRS = arrayOf( BracePair(AblTokenTypes.LPAREN, AblTokenTypes.RPAREN, false), BracePair(AblTokenTypes.LBRACKET, AblTokenTypes.RBRACKET, false) )
